summary: 11 film announcements, 13 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Mummy
film.announcement: Lee Cronin's The Mummy sets HBO Max release date for streaming premiere.

film.title: The Catch
film.talent: Emma Stone, Chris Pine, Tim Robbins, Sissy Spacek
film.announcement: Tim Robbins and Sissy Spacek join Emma Stone and Chris Pine in romantic comedy The Catch at Universal.

film.title: Bender
film.announcement: Michael Medico takes over as director of Bill Burr comedy Bender.

film.title: Five Nights at Freddy's 3
film.announcement: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 lands screenwriter Gary Dauberman, known for It and Annabelle.

film.title: Killa
film.announcement: Imani Lewis and Tanya Wright set to star in horror-drama Killa from director Laci Dent.

film.title: Chronos
film.announcement: Anirudh Pisharody and Tongayi Chirisa set to lead thriller Chronos from director Gianinni Semedo Moreira.

film.title: Cut Your Teeth
film.talent: Arthur Langlie, Riley Dandy, Oliver Stark, Madeline Weinstein; Aaron Moorhead (Producer)
film.announcement: Arthur Langlie, Riley Dandy, Oliver Stark, and Madeline Weinstein set for psychological thriller Cut Your Teeth with Aaron Moorhead among producers.

film.title: Do Not Open
film.talent: Freddy Carter, Lulu Wilson, Mark McKenna
film.announcement: Freddy Carter, Lulu Wilson, and Mark McKenna lead sci-fi horror Do Not Open with filming underway in Texas.

film.title: Baahubali: The Eternal War
film.announcement: SS Rajamouli and Ishan Shukla discuss spinoff Baahubali: The Eternal War and the challenge of animating Prabhas at Annecy.

film.title: Paper Daughter
film.announcement: Director Cami Kwan discusses turning an Angel Island family history into handcrafted stop-motion film Paper Daughter at Annecy.

film.title: Gatto
film.announcement: New footage from Pixar's uniquely animated cat movie Gatto has been seen.

tv.title: The Wolf In Winter
tv.announcement: Prime Video sets premiere date for Novak Djokovic documentary The Wolf In Winter from The Last Dance director Jason Hehir.

tv.title: Pride & Prejudice
tv.announcement: Netflix develops new Pride & Prejudice series adaptation.

tv.title: Every Year After
tv.announcement: Amazon TV Chief Peter Friedlander teases Season 2 renewal for Every Year After at Obsessed Fest kickoff event.

tv.title: Spy Series (Untitled)
tv.talent: Millie Bobby Brown, David Harbour; Jack Thorne (Writer), A24 (Producer)
tv.announcement: Millie Bobby Brown and David Harbour reunite after Stranger Things as father-daughter spies in Netflix series from Enola Holmes writer Jack Thorne and A24.

tv.title: Building The Band
tv.announcement: Netflix cancels Liam Payne show Building The Band after one season.

tv.title: Young Americans
tv.talent: Chris Hutton, Eddie O'Keefe, Bruce Miller (Creators/Producers)
tv.announcement: Hulu orders high school drama pilot Young Americans from Chris Hutton, Eddie O'Keefe, and Bruce Miller to produce.

tv.title: Heist Brothers
tv.announcement: Genndy Tartakovsky's Heist Brothers greenlit to series by Adult Swim.

tv.title: Things I Wanted to Say
tv.announcement: ReelShort adapts Monica Murphy's bestselling dark academia novel Things I Wanted to Say as vertical series.

tv.title: Monster of Florence
tv.announcement: New installment of Monster of Florence from director Stefano Sollima set at Netflix.

tv.title: Dark Shadows
tv.announcement: Warner Bros. reanimating 1960s cult TV show Dark Shadows as animated series.

tv.title: Drag Race México: Latina Royale
tv.announcement: Season 1 cast announced for Drag Race México: Latina Royale competition on WOW Presents Plus.

tv.title: Cartoon Network Docuseries
tv.announcement: Adult Swim announces Cartoon Network docuseries plus two anthology anniversary specials from Robot Chicken.
